releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* feat: reorder and group settings by @joeriddles in https://github.com/joeriddles/extended-task-lists/pull/35
* feat: exclude regions by @joeriddles in https://github.com/joeriddles/extended-task-lists/pull/36
* feat: hierarchy by @joeriddles in https://github.com/joeriddles/extended-task-lists/pull/37
* feat: nested, generated TODO.md by @joeriddles in https://github.com/joeriddles/extended-task-lists/pull/39
* feat: support both comment styles for exclude by @joeriddles in https://github.com/joeriddles/extended-task-lists/pull/40


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/joeriddles/extended-task-lists/compare/1.0.13...1.0.14

releases.description:
## What's Changed
* #8: Support excluding Markdown files and folders from generated TODO file by @joeriddles in https://github.com/joeriddles/extended-task-lists/pull/11
* #7: Order files in generated TODO by creation time, not modified time by @joeriddles in https://github.com/joeriddles/extended-task-lists/pull/12
* #6: Add setting to use full filepath for label in generated TODO by @joeriddles in https://github.com/joeriddles/extended-task-lists/pull/13


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/joeriddles/extended-task-lists/compare/1.0.6...1.0.7

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Extended Task Lists

### Features
- Render in-progress and won't do task items with their own UI
  - in-progress syntax: `- [.] In progress`
  - won't do syntax: `- [~] Won't do`

![image](./static/screenshot.png)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Extended Markdown Plugin

### Features
- Render in-progress and won't do task items with their own UI
  - in-progress syntax: `- [.] In progress`
  - won't do syntax: `- [~] Won't do`

![image](./static/screenshot.png)
